## Title: Fix signed/unsigned integer comparison in NR MAC gNB beam configuration

### Summary
The NR MAC gNB beam initialization code contains a signed/unsigned integer comparison mismatch where `beam_allocation_size` (declared as signed `int`) is compared against unsigned values in size calculations within `initialize_beam_information()`. This triggers compiler warnings and risks incorrect branching behavior. Since these fields represent allocation counts and sizes, they are semantically unsig
